_comment: OPT-IN. Copy the relevant sections into your project's .claude/settings.json (or ~/.claude/settings.json for all projects). The plugin does NOT install these automatically — hooks change every prompt, so you should opt in deliberately.
_pint-after-edit: Auto-runs Pint on changed files after every Edit/Write/MultiEdit. Skips silently if vendor/bin/pint isn't present.
_pest-on-stop: Runs the test suite once at session end. Skip if your suite is slow.
_loaded-stack-on-start: Prints detected Laravel/Pest/Filament versions when a session starts so the agent context starts grounded.

hooks.command: test -f vendor/bin/pest && ./vendor/bin/pest --no-coverage --compact 2>&1 | tail -3 || echo 'pest not installed; skipping'

test -f composer.json && jq -r 'def ver(p): .require[p] // .["require-dev"][p] // "n/a"; "Detected stack: Laravel \(ver("laravel/framework")) · Pest \(ver("pestphp/pest")) · Filament \(ver("filament/filament")) · Livewire \(ver("livewire/livewire"))"' composer.json 2>/dev/null || true
